asyncSessionInvariants.description: Contracts every provider and the controller must uphold after prompt(). These are tested by test-provider-contracts.mjs and test-controller-races.mjs.

sessionIdContracts.promptReturnsResolvableId: /prompt must return a sessionId that /status and /history both accept. Tested: test-provider-contracts.mjs Contract 2.
sessionIdContracts.canonicalIdResolution: If a provider returns a temporary ID before discovering a canonical ID, both must resolve consistently in /status and /history until the frontend switches. Tested: test-provider-contracts.mjs Contract 2b-c.
sessionIdContracts.idResolutionConsistency: /status, /history, and /sessions must use the same ID resolution path. No mismatched aliases. Tested: test-provider-contracts.mjs Contract 4.
sessionIdContracts.reopenPreservesMessages: Reopening a session from /sessions must return the same conversation that the active sessionId saw. Tested: test-provider-contracts.mjs Contract 4.

messageDeliveryContracts.assistantEventuallyVisible: After send, active screen must eventually show assistant response, partial response, or agent error. Navigation away and back must not be the only path to see new content. Tested: test-controller-races.mjs Race 1,6.
messageDeliveryContracts.userMessageNeverDropped: User message must remain visible while backend history is empty or stale. History must never shrink below local count. Tested: test-controller-races.mjs Race 2.
messageDeliveryContracts.historyDoesNotRegress: Backend history must never permanently regress the active message list. Shrinks are tolerated only temporarily. Tested: test-controller-races.mjs Race 2.
messageDeliveryContracts.idleMustCoincideWithContent: status=idle after a prompt must eventually coincide with assistant content or explicit error in history. Tested: test-provider-contracts.mjs Contract 3.

pollingContracts.noSilentPollErrors: Poll exceptions must be observable (console.error, not empty catch). Test mode must surface them. Tested: controller catches now log errors.
pollingContracts.singleFailureNotWedging: A single failed /status or /history poll must not permanently freeze the UI. Next poll must recover. Tested: test-controller-races.mjs Race 3.
pollingContracts.activeScreenKeepsPolling: Active message screen must keep polling until turn reaches terminal state (idle + content or error). Tested: test-polling-controller.mjs.
pollingContracts.thinkingClearsWithoutNavigation: Agent is working status must clear without requiring back-to-sessions-and-reopen. Tested: test-controller-races.mjs Race 1.
pollingContracts.sessionIdUpdatesMidPoll: If canonical ID becomes known mid-session, message screen must adopt it. Tested: test-controller-races.mjs Race 4.

providerContracts.getStatusUnknownDoesNotThrow: getStatus(unknownId) must return null or {state:'idle'}, never throw 500. Tested: test-provider-contracts.mjs Contract 1.
providerContracts.getHistoryUnknownReturnsEmpty: getHistory(unknownId) must return [] or structured error, not throw. Tested: test-provider-contracts.mjs Contract 1.
providerContracts.promptRejectsBusySession: prompt() on an active session must reject with 409. Tested: implicit in provider prompt logic.
providerContracts.inMemoryBeforePersistence: Providers with external persisted storage (oh-my-pi, pi) must expose in-memory partial/final text before persistence catches up. Tested: test-polling-controller.mjs.
providerContracts.sessionCacheInvalidation: Session list cache must invalidate or merge active sessions after prompt starts/finishes. Tested: implicit in listSessions TTL.

errorVisibilityContracts.agentErrorReachesUI: Agent errors from provider/status/result must reach agentError field or visible message UI. Tested: glasses footer shows '| Agent Error'.
errorVisibilityContracts.emptyCatchesDisallowedInTest: Empty catch blocks are disallowed in controller paths. All must log. Tested: all 6 catches now log with context prefix.
errorVisibilityContracts.harnessFailsOnSwallowed: Test harness must detect and fail on swallowed poll exceptions. The controller race test simulates thrown status errors.
